A

addPoint() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Player
Increments the score by one (called when this player matches a pair).
addTurn() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Player
Increments the turn counter by one (called after each completed turn).
addValueChangeListener(SerializableConsumer<T>) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.SegmentedControl
Subscribes to user-initiated selection changes.
applyState(Card, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.MemoryCard
Reflects the current card state on the DOM.

B

beforeEnter(BeforeEnterEvent) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.GameView
Vaadin lifecycle hook fired before this view is rendered.
Board - Class in de.dhbw.memory.model
The game board: a flat list of cards whose index represents the grid position shown in the UI.
Board(int, Theme) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.model.Board
Creates an unshuffled board for the given grid size and theme.

C

Card - Class in de.dhbw.memory.model
A single memory card with a unique id, a motif shared with its pair, and mutable state.
Card(int, String) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
Creates a face-down, unmatched card.
configurePage(AppShellSettings) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.MemoryApplication
 
CRYPTO - Enum constant in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme
 

D

de.dhbw.memory - package de.dhbw.memory
 
de.dhbw.memory.controller - package de.dhbw.memory.controller
 
de.dhbw.memory.model - package de.dhbw.memory.model
 
de.dhbw.memory.view - package de.dhbw.memory.view
 
de.dhbw.memory.view.component - package de.dhbw.memory.view.component
 
de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog - package de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog
 

E

EndGameDialog - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog
End-of-game overlay: winner / tie headline, per-player stats, elapsed time, and two restart options.
EndGameDialog(Game, long, Runnable, Runnable) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog.EndGameDialog
Builds the end-of-game overlay for the given finished Game: headline (winner / tie / single-player completion), per-player stats panel, elapsed time and total moves, and the two restart buttons.

F

FIRST_FLIP - Enum constant in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.FlipResult
First card of this turn was revealed; waiting for the second flip.
flip() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
Toggles the face-up state (face-down ↔ face-up).
flip(int) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Flips the card at position and returns what happened.
flip(int, UI, Runnable) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
Flips the card at position and returns the outcome.
FlipResult - Enum Class in de.dhbw.memory.model
Outcome returned by Game.flip(int) so the controller knows how to react.

G

Game - Class in de.dhbw.memory.model
Core game logic: tracks players, the active player, flipped cards, and turn count.
Game(List<Player>, Board) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Creates a new game.
GameService - Class in de.dhbw.memory.controller
Spring service that orchestrates one Memory game per browser tab.
GameService() - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
 
GameView - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view
The main game screen: card grid, status bar (player info + timer + buttons), and end-of-game overlay.
GameView(GameService) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.view.GameView
Spring injects GameService (it is a @Service bean).
getActivePlayer() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Returns the player whose turn it currently is.
getBoard() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Returns the board.
getCardAt(int) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Board
Returns the card at grid position position.
getCards() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Board
Returns an unmodifiable view of the card list.
getDisplayName(String) - Method in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme
Returns the human-readable display name for a motif id (e.g.
getElapsedSeconds() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
Returns the number of whole seconds that have passed since GameService.startGame(java.util.List<java.lang.String>, int, de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme) was called.
getFolder() - Method in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme
Returns the static-resource sub-folder name for this theme (e.g.
getGame() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
Returns the current Game, or null if GameService.startGame(java.util.List<java.lang.String>, int, de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme) has not been called yet.
getId() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
Returns the unique card id.
getMotif() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
Returns the motif name used to detect pairs.
getMotifsFor(int) - Method in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme
Returns the first (gridSize * gridSize) / 2 motif names for this theme.
getName() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Player
Returns the player's display name.
getPlayers() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Returns an unmodifiable view of the player list.
getScore() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Player
Returns the number of pairs this player has matched.
getSize() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Board
Returns the grid edge length (4 or 6).
getTheme() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
Returns the Theme chosen for the current game, or null before GameService.startGame(java.util.List<java.lang.String>, int, de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme) has been called.
getTotalTurns() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Returns the total number of completed turns (each turn = two cards flipped).
getTurns() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Player
Returns how many complete turns this player has taken.
getValue() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.SegmentedControl
Returns the currently selected item, or null if none.

H

handleKeyboardFlip(int) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.GameView
Called from game.js on Space/Enter — flips the keyboard-focused card.
HelpDialog - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog
"How to play" overlay.
HelpDialog(boolean) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog.HelpDialog
 

I

INVALID - Enum constant in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.FlipResult
Card is already matched or already face-up; the click has no effect.
isFaceUp() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
Returns true when the card is showing its face.
isFinished() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Returns true when every card on the board has been matched.
isMatched() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
Returns true when this card has been permanently matched.
isTie() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Returns true when the game is finished and two or more players share the highest score.
isWaitingForFlipBack() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
Returns true while the flip-back delay after a mismatch is in progress.

L

Labels - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view
Tiny formatter helpers shared across the view layer.
LANGUAGES - Enum constant in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class de.dhbw.memory.MemoryApplication
Boots the Spring Boot context (and, with it, the embedded Tomcat + Vaadin runtime) so the game is reachable in the browser.
match() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Card
Marks the card as permanently matched and keeps it face-up.
MATCH - Enum constant in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.FlipResult
Both cards revealed and motifs match; active player scored and keeps the turn.
MemoryApplication - Class in de.dhbw.memory
Entry point of the DHBW Memory application.
MemoryApplication() - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.MemoryApplication
 
MemoryCard - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view.component
A single Memory card as a Vaadin component.
MemoryCard(int, Theme, String, IntConsumer) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.MemoryCard
Builds a card at the given grid position.

N

NO_MATCH - Enum constant in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.FlipResult
Both cards revealed but motifs differ; controller must schedule a flip-back delay (≈1 500 ms) and then call Game.resetMismatch() to hide the cards and switch player.

O

onThemeSync(String) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.StartView
Called from the client after page load to mirror localStorage into the radio.

P

pairsLabel(int) - Static method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.Labels
Returns a grammatically correct "N pair" / "N pairs" label.
playEntranceAnimation() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.MemoryCard
Adds the staggered entrance animation; called once per card on initial build.
Player - Class in de.dhbw.memory.model
Represents a player participating in the game, identified by name and tracked by score.
Player(String) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.model.Player
Creates a player with zero score and zero turns.

Q

QuitConfirmDialog - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog
Confirmation overlay shown when the user clicks the back-arrow mid-game.
QuitConfirmDialog(Runnable) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.view.dialog.QuitConfirmDialog
 

R

resetMismatch() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Hides both mismatched cards and switches to the next player.

S

SegmentedControl<T> - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view.component
Replacement for RadioButtonGroup that renders as a pill-row "segmented control" instead of stacked radio dots.
SegmentedControl() - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.SegmentedControl
Creates an empty segmented control with the default pill-row appearance.
setItems(T...) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.SegmentedControl
Replaces the choices and rebuilds the DOM.
setKeyboardFocus(int) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.GameView
Called from game.js on arrow keys — moves the focus ring without flipping.
setRenderer(SerializableFunction<T, Component>) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.SegmentedControl
Overrides the per-item renderer; defaults to String.valueOf(item).
setValue(T) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.view.component.SegmentedControl
Programmatic selection — does NOT fire value-change listeners.
shuffle(long) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Board
Shuffles the cards using a seeded Random, making the result deterministic.
shutdown() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
Shuts down the background scheduler when the Vaadin UI (browser tab) is closed.
SPACE - Enum constant in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme
 
startGame(List<String>, int, Theme) - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.controller.GameService
Creates a new game with the given configuration and replaces any previous game.
StartView - Class in de.dhbw.memory.view
Start screen where players configure the game before playing.
StartView(GameService) - Constructor for class de.dhbw.memory.view.StartView
Spring injects GameService (it is a @Service bean).

T

Theme - Enum Class in de.dhbw.memory.model
Available card themes.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.FlipResult

Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.FlipResult
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class de.dhbw.memory.model.Theme
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

W

winner() - Method in class de.dhbw.memory.model.Game
Returns the winning player, or null if the game is not finished or if it is a tie.
